---
title: "Tree families"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

- [Adoxaceae](/trees/family/adoxaceae.html) — 1 species
- [Betulaceae (Birch family)](/trees/family/betulaceae.html) — 6 species
- [Celastraceae](/trees/family/celastraceae.html) — 1 species
- [Dicksoniaceae](/trees/family/dicksoniaceae.html) — 1 species
- [Ebenaceae (Persimmon family)](/trees/family/ebenaceae.html) — 1 species
- [Fagaceae (Oak & Beech family)](/trees/family/fagaceae.html) — 5 species
- [Juglandaceae (Walnut family)](/trees/family/juglandaceae.html) — 1 species
- [Malvaceae](/trees/family/malvaceae.html) — 1 species
- [Moraceae (Fig family)](/trees/family/moraceae.html) — 2 species
- [Oleaceae (Olive family)](/trees/family/oleaceae.html) — 2 species
- [Pinaceae (Pine family)](/trees/family/pinaceae.html) — 2 species
- [Platanaceae](/trees/family/platanaceae.html) — 1 species
- [Rosaceae (Rose family)](/trees/family/rosaceae.html) — 9 species
- [Salicaceae (Willow family)](/trees/family/salicaceae.html) — 4 species
- [Sapindaceae (Maple family)](/trees/family/sapindaceae.html) — 2 species
